'''ngalasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encaenia|encaenia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encaenia|encaenia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngalasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngælæsæth|ngælæsæth]] || [[word:ngælæsæj|ngælæsæj]] || [[word:ngælæsæsh|ngælæsæsh]] || [[word:ngælæsæ|ngælæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalalasath|ngalalasath]] || [[word:ngalalasaj|ngalalasaj]] || [[word:ngalalasash|ngalalasash]] || [[word:ngalalasa|ngalalasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalasath|ngalasath]] || [[word:ngalasaj|ngalasaj]] || [[word:ngalasash|ngalasash]] || [[word:ngalasa|ngalasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalafsath|ngalafsath]] || [[word:ngalafsaj|ngalafsaj]] || [[word:ngalafsash|ngalafsash]] || [[word:ngalafsaf|ngalafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngalasatha|ngalasatha]] || [[word:ngalasaja|ngalasaja]] || [[word:ngalasasha|ngalasasha]] || [[word:ngalasaka|ngalasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngalasath|ngalasath]] || [[word:ngalasaj|ngalasaj]] || [[word:ngalasash|ngalasash]] || [[word:ngalasa|ngalasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngalasathal|ngalasathal]] || [[word:ngalasajal|ngalasajal]] || [[word:ngalasashal|ngalasashal]] || [[word:ngalasakal|ngalasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngalasathatha|ngalasathatha]] || [[word:ngalasajaja|ngalasajaja]] || [[word:ngalasashasha|ngalasashasha]] || [[word:ngalasaka|ngalasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngalasathan|ngalasathan]] || [[word:ngalasajan|ngalasajan]] || [[word:ngalasashan|ngalasashan]] || [[word:ngalasakan|ngalasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngalasathaoro|ngalasathaoro]] || [[word:ngalasajaoro|ngalasajaoro]] || [[word:ngalasashaoro|ngalasashaoro]] || [[word:ngalasakaoro|ngalasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
